name: France
avoid: August (Parisians leave, but tourists flood in)

cities.name: Paris
cities.notes: Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Notre-Dame, Montmartre and world's finest cuisine

cities.name: Nice
cities.notes: Promenade des Anglais, Vieux-Nice old town and Riviera coastal hikes

cities.name: Lyon
cities.notes: Gastronomic capital with bouchon bistros, traboules and Roman amphitheatre

cities.name: Bordeaux
cities.notes: Wine capital with chateau tours, Miroir d'eau and CIVB wine bar

cities.name: Strasbourg
cities.notes: Half-timbered Alsatian Petite France and European Parliament hub

cities.name: Marseille
cities.notes: Vieux-Port fish market, Calanques national park and bouillabaisse

itinerary.sim: Orange Holiday 50GB tourist SIM at Paris CDG arrivals — about ₹3,680 with EU roaming.

Paris.name: Paris
Paris.note: Base yourself in Paris and use two full days for Versailles and Mont Saint-Michel day trips.

activities.name: Airport transfer from CDG to central Paris on RER B
activities.tip: Châtelet-Les-Halles is the most convenient interchange for many central stays.

activities.name: Evening walk from Arc de Triomphe down the Champs-Élysées to Place de la Concorde
Bateaux Parisiens Seine evening cruise with Eiffel Tower views
activities.tip: Book a post-sunset slot for the best tower lighting.

activities.name: Eiffel Tower second-floor visit
activities.tip: Reserve online early; summit upgrade is around ₹2,705 pp.

activities.name: Picnic or photo stop at Champ de Mars
Musée du Quai Branly – Jacques Chirac
Sunset viewpoints from Pont Alexandre III and Trocadéro Gardens
Musée du Louvre timed entry
activities.tip: Choose an early slot to avoid the longest security queues.

activities.name: Palais Royal Gardens and Buren columns
Musée d'Orsay impressionist collection
Sainte-Chapelle stained glass chapel
RER C return trip from Paris to Versailles Château Rive Gauche
activities.tip: Arrive by 9 AM to beat tour groups and palace entry lines.

activities.name: Palace of Versailles Passport Ticket
activities.tip: Covers palace interiors, Trianons and Marie Antoinette estate.

activities.name: Les Grandes Eaux Musicales fountain show
activities.tip: Runs on select Apr–Oct dates, so check the calendar before planning.

activities.name: Gardens of Versailles and Hameau de la Reine walk
TGV Paris Montparnasse to Rennes plus Keolis coach to Mont Saint-Michel
activities.tip: Leave Paris around 7:30 AM and book the TGV early for the lowest fares.

activities.name: Abbey of Mont Saint-Michel
Abbey audio guide
Medieval rampart walk and Grande Rue stroll
Sacré-Cœur Basilica and Montmartre hilltop viewpoints
activities.tip: The basilica is free; dome climb is about ₹736 pp if you want a higher panorama.

activities.name: Place du Tertre artist square and nearby lanes
Musée de Montmartre
Le Marais walk via Place des Vosges and Jewish Quarter
Paris Catacombs optional timed entry
activities.tip: Skip this if you prefer a lighter final day before the train south.

Lyon.name: Lyon
Lyon.note: Best for food-led city breaks; keep Lyon as a compact two-day stop between Paris and the Riviera.

activities.name: TGV from Paris Gare de Lyon to Lyon Part-Dieu
activities.tip: Book 2–3 months ahead for the best TGV fares.

activities.name: Fourvière funicular ride and Basilica of Notre-Dame de Fourvière
Musée Gallo-Romain de Fourvière
Roman Theatres of Fourvière and Vieux Lyon traboules walk
Cathédrale Saint-Jean-Baptiste
Les Halles Paul Bocuse gourmet market tasting circuit
Institut Lumière
Musée des Confluences
Croix-Rousse silk-worker traboules and neighborhood walk
Parc de la Tête d'Or

Nice.name: Nice
Nice.note: Use Nice as your Riviera base and fit the Riviera highlights into a focused three-day stay.

activities.name: TGV from Lyon Part-Dieu to Nice-Ville
activities.tip: Direct or one-change services via Marseille are both common.

activities.name: Promenade des Anglais sunset stroll
Vieux Nice lanes and Cours Saleya market
Fenocchio ice cream stop
Musée Marc Chagall
MAMAC rooftop and modern art collection
Colline du Château viewpoints and waterfall
Musée Matisse in Cimiez
Nice museum pass alternative covering multiple museums
activities.tip: Worth it if you plan to enter three or more Nice museums.

activities.name: Bus from Nice to Èze Village
Jardin Exotique d'Èze
Fragonard Perfume Factory guided visit
Bus from Èze to Monaco
Prince's Palace of Monaco
Monte Carlo Casino exterior or interior entry after 2 PM
activities.tip: If you skip the casino, spend more time around Port Hercule and the old town.

activities.name: Regional train back from Monaco to Nice

connections.method: TGV from Paris Gare de Lyon to Lyon Part-Dieu (about 2 hrs)
TGV from Lyon Part-Dieu to Nice-Ville via Marseille (about 3–4 hrs)
Direct TGV alternative if you skip Lyon (about 5.5 hrs)

extras: Bordeaux wine bars and Médoc day trips
Strasbourg Christmas markets and Petite France

Nice: Promenade des Anglais Nice Baie des Anges
Vieux Nice old town colorful facades
Colline du Château Nice harbor view
